items.title: The Magic of Agentic AI Will Come From a Holistic Approach to Chip Design
items.summary:
Serial EDA entrepreneur Simon Davidmann explains where AI continues to create new opportunities in EDA.

items.title: PQC Timelines Provide Direction, but Not Action
items.summary:
U.K. and EU PQC adoption timelines provide direction but lack regulatory teeth. Learn why delaying migration creates critical security risks.

items.title: No Fear to Fail: Secrets Behind Southchip’s Rapid Growth
items.summary:
Since going public in 2023, Southchip has grown rapidly, driven by core semiconductor technologies and diversification into automotive and industrial sectors.

items.title: Intel Enters Pact With Tesla and SpaceX for Terafab
items.summary:
“Terafab is likely an Intel fab expansion, with Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI as anchor customers, rather than a standalone venture,” said Yole analyst Adrien Sánchez.
The post Intel Enters Pact With Tesla and SpaceX for Terafab appeared first on EE Times.

items.title: SiFive $400M Round Highlights New CPU Battleground for Agentic AI Demand
items.summary:
